records.question: What bookings have an amount payable of at most 386.92 and come from customers who are exactly bad?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE customers.good_or_bad_customer = 'bad' AND bookings.amount_payable <= 386.92
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.booking_id FROM Bookings AS T1 INNER JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.amount_payable <= 386.92 AND T2.good_or_bad_customer = 'bad'

records.question: How many bookings with at least 3 products booked and a discount of at least 48.73 have a status date on or after 2018-03-22 00:16:58 and ended on or after 2017-10-02 07:28:09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN products_booked ON bookings.booking_id = products_booked.booking_id
JOIN view_product_availability ON bookings.booking_id = view_product_availability.booking_id
WHERE products_booked.booked_count >= 3 AND bookings.amount_of_discount >= 48.73 AND view_product_availability.status_date >= '2018-03-22 00:16:58' AND bookings.booking_end_date >= '2017-10-02 07:28:09'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.booking_id
FROM Bookings AS T1
JOIN Products_Booked AS T2
  ON T1.booking_id = T2.booking_id
JOIN View_Product_Availability AS T3
  ON T1.booking_id = T3.booking_id
WHERE
  T1.amount_of_discount >= 48.73 AND T3.status_date >= '2018-03-22 00:16:58' AND T1.booking_end_date >= '2017-10-02 07:28:09'
GROUP BY
  T1.booking_id
HAVING
  COUNT(T2.product_id) >= 3

records.question: Which bookings have a booking end date exactly equal to '2017-10-11 03:00:15', a booking status code exactly equal to 'Provisional', are associated with customers whose first name is exactly 'Marilou', have payments with a payment date exactly equal to '2018-03-22 15:00:23', and also have related records in the view_product_availability?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN payments ON bookings.booking_id = payments.booking_id
JOIN view_product_availability ON bookings.booking_id = view_product_availability.booking_id
WHERE payments.payment_date = '2018-03-22 15:00:23' AND bookings.booking_end_date = '2017-10-11 03:00:15' AND customers.first_name = 'Marilou' AND bookings.booking_status_code = 'Provisional'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.booking_id
FROM Bookings AS T1
INNER JOIN Customers AS T2
  ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id
INNER JOIN Payments AS T3
  ON T1.booking_id = T3.booking_id
INNER JOIN View_Product_Availability AS T4
  ON T1.booking_id = T4.booking_id
WHERE
  T1.booking_end_date = '2017-10-11 03:00:15' AND T1.booking_status_code = 'Provisional' AND T2.first_name = 'Marilou' AND T3.payment_date = '2018-03-22 15:00:23'
